repair_candidate.pr_body:
Summary

No replacement PR should be opened for this shard. Current main already contains the request-scoped active plugin-registry workspace-dir pin proposed by source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819, plus focused regression coverage in src/plugins/runtime-workspace-state.test.ts.

Credit / attribution

Preserve credit for @k-l-lambda and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819 in any later closeout, release-note, or maintainer context.

Verification

- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/runtime-workspace-state.test.ts

Observed result: 1 file passed, 5 tests passed.
credit_notes: Preserve source credit for @k-l-lambda and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819 if maintainers later post closeout or release-note context.
